stories.title: Lacari returns to streaming, says forensic review found no illegal content
stories.summary: Returning after a hiatus, streamer Lacari addressed past controversies, stating an independent forensic review found no illegal content on his devices. He shared his struggles with stress, anxiety, and addiction, detailing his commitment to therapy and recovery programs. Lacari expressed gratitude to his long-time fans and vowed to focus on personal improvement and healthier routines moving forward.

YouTuber Rosanna Pansino undergoes surgery after breaking jaw in boat accident
stories.summary: Popular YouTuber Rosanna Pansino faced a frightening incident on her 41st birthday. A fall while disembarking a boat resulted in a severely fractured jaw, broken into four pieces. She also sustained facial injuries and shattered front teeth. Pansino underwent surgery to repair her jaw with a metal plate and screws.
